diagrams.title: Hash Table Structure with Separate Chaining
diagrams.description: Shows hash table array with linked lists at each bucket handling collisions
elements: Each bucket contains pointer to linked list head
Keys K1, K2, K3 hash to same bucket forming chain
Hash function maps keys to indices
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how separate chaining stores multiple elements at same index

diagrams.title: Linear Probing Collision Resolution
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how linear probing finds empty slots after collisions
elements: Hash table array with initial element at index 5
Collision at 5: probe to 6, then 7, find empty slot
diagrams.purpose: Understand linear probing sequence and clustering problem

diagrams.title: Load Factor Impact on Performance
diagrams.description: Graph showing relationship between load factor and average probe length
elements: Curve showing steep rise after 0.7 threshold
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why load factor threshold matters for performance
